title: paneion
intro: Paneion, also known as Wild Chamomile, is a flowering plant in the daisy family with a long history of use in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Paneion include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and calming effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Paneion include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote relaxation, making it a popular natural remedy for insomnia and restlessness. Herbal preparations of Paneion include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed on their own or used in combination with other herbs to enhance their therapeutic effects.
